name: Chicken & Sausage Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 each fresh tomato or 16 oz canned tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut up the chicken and remove the skin if desired.
2. Dredge the chicken in flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Fry the chicken until browned.
4. Slice up a pound of the smoked sausage (or try Louisiana's Andouie if available).
5. Brown the sausage on both sides using a heavy iron skillet.
6. Save the grease from the chicken and sausage.
7. Fry the tomatoes, onion, and okra in about 2 T shortening or oil until tender.
8. Make a roux with 2 T oil and 2 T flour, stirring and cooking over medium-low heat until very dark without burning.
9. Add the chicken and sausage to the roux, stirring briefly.
10. Place all ingredients into a heavy, deep iron pan, add water, and cook for about 2 hours.
11. Cook slowly, adding water if needed. The okra will thicken the gumbo as it cooks.
